security-notes.SEC-101: sweetrdf/easyrdf pinned to ^1.19 (>=1.19.0 <2.0.0). The previous '*' constraint accepted any future major release including a v2 with API breaks. The runtime caller tools/tool_import_rdf/class.tool_import_rdf.php uses the v1 EasyRdf\Graph API.
security-notes.SEC-101-followup: RESOLVED (CONF-01, 2026-06): sweetrdf/easyrdf moved from require-dev to require — it is a runtime dependency of tool_import_rdf, so `composer install --no-dev` must ship it. The tool now relies on composer PSR-4 autoloading (EasyRdf\ => lib) instead of the never-existent lib/vendor includes.
